title: Camp Day Rules
appliesTo: Chae Hull, Carleton Ravens, and Sensplex camp days
rules: Outside work is recovery-only or a short optional touch block.
warning: Do not stack conditioning or make-up sessions after camp.

title: Marc Session Rules
appliesTo: Marc O'Connor powerskating, skills, and tryout sessions
rules: Treat the on-ice session as the day's hard skill load.
Keep off-ice work easy or skip it.
Track energy, confidence, and soreness afterward.
warning: No hard dryland on the same day.

title: Lacrosse Load Rules
appliesTo: Lacrosse through the end of June
rules: Count lacrosse as a hard multidirectional running day.
Adjust the next speed session if legs are heavy.
Confirm exact session time when known.
warning: No extra sprint, agility, or conditioning after lacrosse.

title: Deload Rules
rules: Reduce volume before reducing movement quality.
Use mobility, easy touches, and normal activity.
Finish sessions feeling better than they started.
warning: Do not make up missed hard work during deload.

title: Tryout Taper Rules
appliesTo: Final two weeks and tryout week
rules: Protect sleep, hydration, and normal meals.
warning: No fitness tests, new complex skills, or catch-up volume.
